items.title: Fidelity, BlackRock Target Chinese Demand for Offshore Funds
items.description: (Bloomberg) -- Fidelity International is poised to offer products that attract mainland investors chasing higher returns from overseas funds, according to people familiar with the matter. items.title: Federal Reserve Keeps Two Rate-Cut Outlook, But S&P 500 Isn't So Sure
items.description: Federal Reserve policymakers are standing by their expectation of 50 basis points in rate cuts this year, as forecasts for unemployment and the inflation impact of Trump tariffs were both revised upward.  The S&P 500 finished fractionally lower after Chairman Jerome Powell touted the resilience of the U.S. economy at his usual news conference, lifting the 10-year Treasury yield off its lows.  Financial stocks such as JPMorgan Chase kept a positive tone after the Fed.

items.title: Federal Reserve Sticks To Two Rate-Cut Outlook, Powell Speaking; S&P 500 Rises (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Federal Reserve still expects two rate cuts in 2025 as raised inflation forecasts and cut growth targets. The S&P 500 rose with Chairman Jerome Powell about to speak.
